title: Salon & Spa Review Strategy: Get Clients Raving Online
titleZh: 美容沙龍與 SPA 評論策略：讓客戶在網上讚不絕口

metaDescription: A 2026 study shows 92% of beauty clients check reviews before booking. This guide provides a complete salon and spa Google review strategy to build a stellar reputation and attract more clients.
